body_txt: A villain spends his whole first appearance insulting or belittling his opponents. After a humiliating defeat at the hands of The Hero he starts to become nicer to those who have won and now considers them to be a Worthy Opponent . Sometimes it may take repeated losses to cause this in the case of a particularly stubborn villain. Every Unknown Rival is motivated by this trope. This is also the idea behind the victims of The Bully : "You have to stand for yourself". Distinct from Defeat Means Friendship because the opponent is still an enemy to the victor, but it can eventually evolve into friendship. Compare Graceful Loser and Touché .
